testcase.name: 2: xcodebuild test -scheme 'ThankfulGratitudeApp' -project '/Users/cbns03/Downloads/anicca-project/rork-thankful-gratitude-app/ThankfulGratitudeApp.xcodeproj' -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,id=Shutdown' -derivedDataPath '/tmp/thankful-dd' DEVELOPMENT_TEAM=S5U8UH3JLJ 2>&1 | xcpretty --color || xcodebuild test -scheme 'ThankfulGratitudeApp' -project '/Users/cbns03/Downloads/anicca-project/rork-thankful-gratitude-app/ThankfulGratitudeApp.xcodeproj' -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,id=Shutdown' -derivedDataPath '/tmp/thankful-dd' DEVELOPMENT_TEAM=S5U8UH3JLJ 2>&1 | tail -20
